name: Tenyi Spirit - Suruya
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－スールヤ
desc: If you control a Wyrm monster, or a face-up non-Effect Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Wyrm Synchro Monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Tenyi" Link Monster from your Extra Deck (but it cannot be used as Link Material), then you lose LP equal to its Link Rating x 1000. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Suruya" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Wyrm monster, or a face-up non-Effect Monster: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as material for a Wyrm Synchro Monster: You can Special Summon 1 "Tenyi" Link Monster from your Extra Deck (but it cannot be used as Link Material), then you lose LP equal to its Link Rating x 1000. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Suruya" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Suruya" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Synchro Material
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
